summary: Post-refactor smoke test of Overlap – Holiday Calendar. Tested all 8 specified features across both backend and frontend. Backend: 21 API tests all passing. Frontend: all critical user flows verified with Playwright — home screen, country picker modal, search, country selection, compare, stat cards, tab switching, year picker.

issues: React Native 'shadow*' style props deprecated warning in browser console (use 'boxShadow'). Non-functional but noisy.
React Native 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated warning in console. Non-functional.

action_items: Optional: Replace React Native 'shadow*' style props with 'boxShadow' to clear console warnings (affects StatsBar.tsx and other components with shadow styles)
Optional: Replace 'pointerEvents' prop with 'style.pointerEvents' in React Native components to clear console warnings

Optional: data-testid attributes on React Native View/TouchableOpacity components are not rendered as HTML data-testid attributes in Expo web preview — if testability matters, consider using testID prop (React Native standard) instead of data-testid
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid is used in index.tsx on React Native TouchableOpacity components but React Native web does not forward these as HTML data-testid attributes — use 'testID' prop instead which React Native properly maps to the test-id attribute in DOM
backend/server.py is ~600 lines — acceptable but borderline. If it grows, split helpers (detect_long_weekends, check_true_overlap) into a separate utils.py module
server.py uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in newer FastAPI — consider using lifespan context manager
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 1 — full smoke test after index.tsx refactor. All features work. Backend: /api/countries, /api/compare, /api/health, /api/holidays/{code}/{year} all tested. Frontend: home load, country picker via both Get Started and selection bar, search, select, compare, stat cards clickable, tabs (holidays/overlaps/longweekends), year picker all verified. No regressions found from refactor. Minor console deprecation warnings only.
